data.html_notes: The Spark "existing address data update forbidden" case is currently logged as an Error and reported to Sentry. It is an expected/benign condition and should be a warning, not an error — it should NOT go to Sentry. Error: [HRPC_ERR]=ERR_EXISTING_ADDRESS_SPARK_DATA_UPDATE_FORBIDDEN Endpoint: PATCH /api/v1/wallets/:id Level: Error -> should be Warning Sentry issue: https://sentry.rumble.work/organizations/rumble/issues/132843/?environment=production&project=43 Action: downgrade this from error to warning so it stops creating Sentry error issues.
data.name: Downgrade ERR_EXISTING_ADDRESS_SPARK_DATA_UPDATE_FORBIDDEN to warning (stop Sentry error)
data.notes:
The Spark "existing address data update forbidden" case is currently logged as an Error and reported to Sentry. It is an expected/benign condition and should be a warning, not an error — it should NOT go to Sentry.

Error: [HRPC_ERR]=ERR_EXISTING_ADDRESS_SPARK_DATA_UPDATE_FORBIDDEN
Endpoint: PATCH /api/v1/wallets/:id
Level: Error -> should be Warning

Sentry issue:
https://sentry.rumble.work/organizations/rumble/issues/132843/?environment=production&project=43

Action: downgrade this from error to warning so it stops creating Sentry error issues.
